name: Men Guard Capsule
description: Men Guard Capsule is a combination of the 3 most powerful men's tonic – Tongkat Ali, KSM-66™ Ashwagandha and Maca. It is designed to boost fertility, testosterone levels, muscle mass, and overall men's health.
benefits: Improves sleep, mood and overall general and sexual health
Natural hormones balancing effect and anti-aging properties
Promotes endurance, strength, muscle size and muscle recovery rate
Reduces stress, anxiety and cortisol levels

dosage.general: Take after meal for best absorption

ingredients: Tongkat Ali Extract 100mg (standardized to min. 1% eurycomanone)
who_can_consume: Men seeking to improve fertility, testosterone levels, muscle mass, energy, and overall men's health.
who_cannot_consume: Not specified. Consult a healthcare professional if pregnant, nursing, or have hormone-related conditions.

qa.question: What are the key ingredients in Men Guard and their benefits?
qa.answer: Men Guard contains three powerful ingredients: Tongkat Ali (Malaysian ginseng) for testosterone and energy, KSM-66™ Ashwagandha for stress reduction and muscle growth, and Maca (Peruvian ginseng) for fertility and vitality.

qa.question: Is Men Guard only for older men?
qa.answer: No, Men Guard is suitable for adult men of all ages who want to support their overall men's health, testosterone levels, fertility, or physical performance.
